timeline.description: General street activity observed, including pedestrians and various vehicles moving on the road, while individuals are gathered near parked auto-rickshaws.
A woman enters the frame walking on the sidewalk. Subsequently, a man is observed walking on the road.

An incident involving an explosion or impact occurs near the auto-rickshaws, generating significant smoke and debris. People are seen fleeing the area, while one individual walks towards the incident scene.

summary: The CCTV footage initially depicts routine street activity with pedestrians and vehicles, and individuals gathered near parked auto-rickshaws. This calm scene is abruptly interrupted by an explosion or significant impact occurring near the auto-rickshaws, producing extensive smoke and debris. Following the incident, most individuals are seen fleeing the area, while one person notably approaches the scene.

raw_events.description: A pedestrian is walking along the roadside pavement, moving from left to right. Several people are visible near parked auto-rickshaws on the left side. Vehicles are moving on the main road in the distance.
The pedestrian continues walking right. A yellow and green auto-rickshaw (number 3) is now visible on the road, moving from left to right. People near the parked auto-rickshaws remain.
The pedestrian is almost out of frame to the right. A white SUV with a red cross (possibly an ambulance) is on the road, moving right. A motorbike with two riders is also on the road, moving right.
A grey SUV is on the road, moving right. A motorbike with one rider is also on the road, moving right. People near the auto-rickshaw stand remain visible.
A red SUV is on the road, moving right. A female individual holding a phone enters the frame from the bottom right corner, walking left.
A woman is walking on the sidewalk. Multiple people are near parked auto-rickshaws on the left. A red car and a black SUV are on the road, with a motorcycle carrying two riders further down the road.
The woman continues walking on the sidewalk. A man in a red shirt is now walking on the road. The black SUV and motorcycle have moved further away. People are still near the auto-rickshaws.

An incident involving an explosion or impact has occurred near the auto-rickshaws, generating smoke and debris. A scooter has fallen on the road. A woman (previously seen) is now running away on the sidewalk, looking back.

Significant smoke and debris obscure the incident area near the auto-rickshaws. Multiple people are running away from the scene. Another woman has entered the foreground, walking towards the incident area. A displaced yellow object is on the sidewalk.

Continued smoke and dust from the incident. People are still moving away from the blast zone. The woman in the foreground continues to walk towards the incident area. Debris remains on the road and sidewalk.
